summary: Comprehensive frontend smoke test of Career Explorer AI SPA. All critical flows verified end-to-end: landing → 9-question assessment → 10-career rating → top-3 results, plus persistence, navigation guards, back navigation, and scoring correctness.
passed: Clicking Start navigates to /assessment and shows 'Q1/9'
Q1 option selection enables next-button; progress counter '01 / 09' displays
Completed all 9 questions and navigated to /rate
/rate displays exactly 10 career rows with kebab-case star testids
Star toggle clears rating (clicking same star twice); submit re-disabled until all rated
Rating counter shows '10 / 10 rated' after rating all
Top match name/percent/description/skills (5)/why all present; #1 = Software Engineer @ 84% (scoring logic correct)
secondary-match-2, secondary-match-3 and other-career-4..10 all rendered
Download button click triggers html2canvas with no JS errors
view-last-result-link appears on landing after completing rating
Back-button preserves prior answer with data-selected=true on option card
localStorage persists currentStep and answers across reload (returned to Q2 with selection intact)
notes: Scoring verified: SE-aligned answers (q2=salary, q3=building, q4=tech, q5=google, q6=systems, q7=app, q8=technical, q9=se) correctly produced Software Engineer as #1 on rating page (top of top-10) and as the top match on results page (84% after 5-star rating). No backend interactions in app; backend testing skipped as instructed.
